nodes.name: Daily 7AM ET
nodes.notes: Trigger: 7:00 AM ET daily. Reads approved queue and schedules posts for the day.

nodes.name: Read Approved Queue
nodes.notes: Read all .md files from queue/approved/. Parse YAML frontmatter for metadata.

nodes.name: Filter Today's Items
nodes.notes: Filter for items scheduled today or with no date (post ASAP). Sort by priority.

nodes.name: Items to Schedule?
nodes.notes: Stop if no items to schedule today.

nodes.name: Enforce Cadence Rules
nodes.notes: Apply cadence.md rules: max posts per account, weekend rules. Defer excess items.

nodes.name: Assign Posting Times
nodes.notes: Assign optimal posting times based on cadence.md peak windows.

nodes.name: DRY_RUN Log
nodes.notes: Log schedule to file. Files NOT moved in DRY_RUN mode.

nodes.name: Schedule + Move Files
nodes.notes: Move files from approved/ to scheduled/ with updated frontmatter. TODO: Add actual posting API calls when available.

nodes.name: Discord: Schedule Summary
nodes.notes: Daily summary of scheduled and deferred posts.
